Description: Verify a reserved plot returns to Available when cancelled
Steps: Open a reserved plot; Choose Cancel reservation; Confirm cancellation
Expected Result: Plot detail loads; Confirmation prompt appears; Plot status returns to Available

Description: Ensure an approved refund posts back to the customer contract
Steps: Open a paid contract; Initiate a refund and submit for approval; Approve the refund in Coupa
Expected Result: Contract shows paid balance; Refund enters Pending Approval; Refund posts and balance updates

Description: Smoke check that the daily revenue report runs without error
Steps: Open Reporting; Select End-of-day revenue; Run for today
Expected Result: Reporting menu opens; Report parameters accepted; Report generates with totals

Description: Confirm a field operator can update a customer phone number
Steps: Open a customer record; Edit the phone number; Save
Expected Result: Customer record opens; Field is editable; Change is saved and shown
